news.title: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?
news.summary: Meta is making a major push to expand its business beyond online advertising. But past efforts show that success is far from guaranteed. Click through the gallery to see how Meta has fared in the past.

news.title: Analysis: An end to the Iran war may be just the beginning of a new era of U.S. inequality
news.summary: Stocks have boomed while consumers have paid the costs of high energy prices. Consumers have been hit with higher gas and electricity prices in recent months. Stocks have also boomed as a result.

news.title: Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing ‘final determination’ on deal
news.summary: Trump's statement left unclear which of his conditions are already part of a deal that negotiators are working on to pause the U.S.-Iran war.

news.title: Oil exports through the Strait of Hormuz might not return to levels seen before the Iran war
news.summary: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has seriously challenged freedom of navigation in the sea lane. The blockade has raised questions about the future of the strait.

news.title: Will Gen Z be the generation to revive moviegoing?
news.summary: Gen Zers are driving demand for anime and video game titles at the theaters. Gen Zers like affordable, social experiences and are drivingdemand for anime, video games.

news.title: ‘I feel like I’m living a lie’: My husband and I pretend we’re strapped for cash in front of friends. Is that bad?
news.summary: “I’ve found that acting ‘normal’ means others treat me like one of the group,” she says.

news.title: Investing in the Dow or S&P 500 doesn’t matter — here’s what actually does
news.summary: Time in the stock market is more important than index selection. The Dow’s 130-year history proves it. Time in the Stock Market is More important than Index Selection.

news.title: The ‘Three A’s’ are keeping the economy afloat during Iran war. Is it enough to avoid recession?
news.summary: The U.S. economy may be more fragile than a raging bull market suggests, a new report says. The report says the economy is still in the early stages of a recovery.

news.title: The U.S.-China rivalry is killing global supply chains. Your portfolio needs a ‘home court advantage.’
news.summary: Globalization is giving way to geopolitical power cartels and a structural shift toward domestic, state-subsidized industries, writes CNN's John Sutter. Sutter: The world is seeing a shift toward state-backed industries.

news.title: My golf buddy dropped me when I didn’t ask him to be my financial adviser. Was I naive?
news.summary: “Friendliness alone is not a sufficient reason to trust someone with your finances,” she says. “Friendly’s not the same as ‘trust me,’’ she adds.
